entities.name: WHEAT STRAW
entities.description: Straw from wheat plants undergoing biological degradation

entities.name: MINERALIZATION
entities.description: The process of converting organic matter into inorganic forms of nutrients

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The breakdown of organic material by living organisms

entities.name: MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Inoculated biological agents used to degrade straw and release nutrients

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: Nutrient released as ammonical and nitrate forms during degradation

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Nutrient released during mineralization, specifically by Penicillium sp.

entities.name: PENICILLIUM SP.
entities.description: A specific microorganism found to be most active in releasing available phosphorus

entities.name: POTASH
entities.description: Nutrient whose amount declined as degradation progressed
